description: Resumable progress tracker for the ImtehanHub documentation project. Re-running the docs prompt should always start by reading this file.

postBatchPolish.label: Description floor + FAQ landing
actions: Tightened 25 remaining meta descriptions from 167-205 chars down to 128-153 chars (all now under the 160-char Google snippet floor)

Added docs/faq.md — 30-question landing page covering About, Pricing, Content coverage, Bilingual, Privacy, Mobile, Community, Developer/OSS, Getting started. Highest-leverage AEO citation block per Princeton GEO study.
Wired FAQ into docsSidebar (between Privacy & Data and Credits)
Fixed YAML front-matter parse error in docs/community/voting.md (inner colon hazard) — caught by Docusaurus build

postBatchPolish.label: Compare + Glossary + strengthened Credits
actions: Rewrote docs/credits.md — full developer profile, hire-Ahsan section, tech specialisations, engagement models, dedicated Why Ahsan section. Direct serve of user's stated profile-views goal.

Added docs/compare.md — honest comparison of ImtehanHub vs tuition academies, past-paper booklets, other paid MCQ apps, free YouTube/PDF channels. Comparison pages get ~33% of all AI citations per Princeton GEO (KDD 2024) — highest of any content type.

Added docs/glossary.md — 35+ Pakistani exam and platform terms with definitions (Matric, FA/FSc, BISE, FBISE, CNIC, NADRA, Nastaliq, Tesseract, etc). Serves as a definition source for AI extractors answering 'what does X mean in Pakistani education?' queries.
Wired Compare and Glossary into the docsSidebar (next to FAQ and Credits at the root level).
Fixed slug-based internal links (Docusaurus routeBasePath /docs means slugs resolve under /docs/, so /faq must be /docs/faq for inter-doc links).

humanOnlyStepsRemaining: Create public GitHub repo aoneahsan/imtehanhub-docs and push
GSC + Bing + Yandex verification and sitemap submission
Issue IndexNow API key and place key file
Deploy main imtehanhub app to surface the new footer Documentation link

batches.title: Scaffold + branding + SEO baseline + planning files
Getting Started + Core Concepts (11 pages)
batches.sidebarUpdates: Expanded Getting Started (5 new), added Core Concepts category (6 new)

batches.title: Tests & Practice (9 pages)
batches.sidebarUpdates: Added Tests & Practice category with 9 items

batches.title: Community Module (14 pages)
batches.sidebarUpdates: Added Community Module category with 14 items (collapsed by default)

batches.title: Account + Institutes + Mobile + Privacy (13 pages)
batches.sidebarUpdates: Added four collapsed categories — Account & Settings (6), Institutes (3), Mobile App (2), Privacy & Data (2)
batches.notes: Three forward-references to Batch 6 developer-architecture pages were softened (no link) to keep onBrokenLinks: throw build clean.

batches.title: Developer / Contributor section (12 pages)
batches.sidebarUpdates: Added second sidebar 'developersSidebar' with 5 categories (Overview, Architecture, Data Pipeline, SEO, Contributing) and a navbar 'Developer' entry pointing at it. The architecture section is open-by-default; pipeline/seo/contributing collapsed.

batches.title: Polish + SEO sweep + Firebase deploy prep
actions: Audited title/description lengths across 65 doc pages (66 issues found)
Tightened 24 worst-offender meta descriptions (was >200 chars, now <=160) covering account, institutes, mobile, privacy, community, developers, discovery sections
Refreshed static/llms.txt to include all 7 new doc sections (account, institutes, mobile, privacy, developer architecture, pipeline, SEO, contributing) — full URL index for AI crawlers
Generated static/img/og-image.png (1200x630) from og-image.svg via rsvg-convert — needed for social-share cards (Facebook, LinkedIn, Slack, X)
Added 'Documentation ↗' footer link in main imtehanhub app (src/components/layout/Footer.tsx, Connect column, same external-link pattern as Support)
Created _planning/DEPLOYMENT-CHECKLIST.md — 11-step human-only operations runbook (GitHub repo, Firebase deploy, DNS, GSC/Bing/Yandex, IndexNow, third-party presence, verification)
Tracker bumped to status: code-complete-awaiting-deploy with lastSuccessfulRun 2026-05-11 and nextEligibleRun 2026-05-18
Final yarn build clean (onBrokenLinks: throw passed)

humanOnlySteps: Create public GitHub repo aoneahsan/imtehanhub-docs and grant push access.
Confirm or create Firebase project for hosting.
Add DNS CNAME from imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com → Firebase Hosting target.
Verify ownership in Google Search Console (TXT or HTML upload).
Verify ownership in Bing Webmaster Tools.
Verify ownership in Yandex Webmaster (HTML file).
Issue IndexNow API key and place key file in /static/.
Add docs link to main imtehanhub app footer.
